Description

Class handles the page for adding items to the menu

Java class to create back button functionality

Handles the database connection to the program

Java class to store information about items in excess table

Class of FoodItem, holding the relevant data of the FoodItem.
InventoryItem
Class that creates an InventoryItem.

Class creates and initializes the landing page.

Class handles the manager page and controlls its functions to the database
